title: triorchis longilabris
intro: Triorchis longilabris, also known as the 'Long-lipped Triorchis', is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae and is native to tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Triorchis longilabris include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be applied topically to affected areas.
